creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
The asterisk port already has too many options, I'd rather avoid adding other.

Anyway the port already allows you to use a precompiled menuselect options file to customize your build.

The file can be generated using the asterisk provided menuselect program, which is available after make configure.

Once generated you can put the file in files/.asterisk.makeopts, it will  be picked up and used for the build.

It's been added exactly for the kind of situation you're describing.
